summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of GradTable Ghana graduation event booking system. All backend APIs (27/27 tests passed - 100% success rate) and frontend features are working correctly. Booking flow, payment processing (test mode), and admin panel fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: All 27 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: Public endpoints - GET /api/dates, /api/products, /api/event-settings
Backend: Booking creation - POST /api/bookings with validation
Backend: Test payment completion - POST /api/payments/test-complete/{booking_id}
Backend: Booking lookup - GET /api/bookings/lookup/{reservation_code}
Backend: Admin login - POST /api/admin/login
Backend: Admin stats - GET /api/admin/stats
Backend: Admin bookings - GET /api/admin/bookings
Backend: Admin payments - GET /api/admin/payments
Backend: Admin products CRUD - GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/products
Backend: Admin dates CRUD - GET/POST/DELETE /api/admin/dates
Backend: Admin table assignment - POST /api/admin/tables/assign
Backend: Admin settings - GET/PATCH /api/admin/settings
Frontend: Landing page renders with hero section, how it works, CTA buttons
Frontend: Booking wizard Step 1 - Personal info form with all fields and validation
Frontend: Booking wizard Step 2 - Attendees selection (10/20/More with custom input)
Frontend: Booking wizard Step 3 - Food toggle and menu tabs (food/drink/pastry)
Frontend: Booking wizard Step 3 - Quantity steppers and stock display working
Frontend: Booking wizard Step 4 - Review page with cost breakdown
Frontend: Total cost auto-calculation updates correctly
Frontend: Complete booking flow with test payment redirect
Frontend: Payment callback page shows reservation code and table number
Frontend: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@gradtable.com / admin123)
Frontend: Admin dashboard Overview tab with KPI cards (bookings, revenue, attendees)
Frontend: Admin Bookings tab with table assignment functionality
Frontend: Admin Products tab with food/drink/pastry tabs and CRUD operations
Frontend: Admin Dates tab with add/delete functionality
Frontend: Admin Settings tab with event fee per person configuration

additional_notes.paystack_status: Paystack is NOT configured (PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY is empty in backend/.env). This is expected and documented. Test payment endpoint POST /api/payments/test-complete/{booking_id} is working correctly for testing without Paystack keys.
additional_notes.test_mode_notification: Frontend shows toast notification 'Paystack not configured. Using test mode...' when payment is initiated, which correctly informs users.
additional_notes.stock_tracking: Product stock is correctly deducted after successful payment completion
additional_notes.table_assignment: Auto table assignment working (T1, T2, T100, etc.)
additional_notes.reservation_codes: Unique reservation codes generated with KAD prefix (e.g., KAD618, KAD804)
additional_notes.mobile_responsive: Admin panel has mobile navigation toggle for smaller screens
additional_notes.data_seeding: Database properly seeded with admin user, graduation dates, and products on startup
